svg.title: Matrix multiplication with sample and neuron labels
svg.desc: Input 3x4 times weights 4x3 plus bias 3x1 equals output 3x3, with sample and neuron labels on output
svg.text: One forward pass through a layer
Each row in the output = one sample's result across all 3 neurons
Each column in the output = one neuron's output for all 3 samples
